creator: vd@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hi, 

The packages in 
http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages/Latest/ 
are compiled for FreebSD 9.x which has /usr/lib/libssl.so.6. 

Your system is 10.0-CURRENT for which the packages are currently not built. 
This means you have to install wget from the ports collection. The packages 
for 10.0 will eventually be available at: 
http://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/amd64/packages-10-current/Latest/
